title: Good Recipes
description: A mod that adds more interesting crafting recipes
body:
![Good Recipes Banner](https://i.imgur.com/WLWGZpN.jpeg) # An important update about supported versions **We're discontinuing updates for older versions and will only maintain 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, and future 26.1.x (hotfixes only for unsupported versions).** --- Minecraft by default doesn't include some basic recipes, like a simple Name Tag, certain heads/skulls, or Shroomlight. This mod adds those recipes, and many other interesting ones such as: - Totem of Undying. - Trident. - More ways to obtain dyes. - Obsidian by mixing a lava bucket and water bucket. - And many more! Check out the gallery. This mod also gives you recipes dedicated to reverting changes, for example removing the slime from pistons, converting special rails back to normal ones, emptying minecarts, etc. Another, it includes several furnace recipes, like turning rotten flesh into leather and cooking slabs and raw ore blocks. More things will be added ;) All this and more with **Good Recipes** - Ready to improve your gameplay experience?

Made by JotaPanden
